admission_policy.proof_ready_rule: Historical-ready symbols require exact imported daily bid/ask replay coverage before authoritative profitability claims.
admission_policy.expansion_rule: Expansion symbols may be scanned live only when they pass current production liquidity, quote freshness, spread, and risk gates; they remain research/backfill candidates until exact history exists.
admission_policy.profitability_policy: Do not mix expansion-symbol research P&L into proof-ready SPY/QQQ profitability claims.

tiers.label: Proof-Ready Broad Index Core
tiers.admission_rule: SPY/QQQ are the current historical-ready subset for Lane A exact daily replay.

tiers.label: Broad Liquid Expansion Candidates
tiers.admission_rule: Broad liquid names can be scanned under production gates, but need source-labeled exact option history before profitability promotion.
